combined_text: Fallout 4 is coming to VR "Virtual Reality Fallout 4 is coming to VRBethesda's post-apocalyptic RPG Fallout 4 will be getting a VR makeover for HTC Vive in 2017By Matt Kamen13 Jun 2016Bethesda Fallout 4 is coming to virtual reality, with the massive open-world RPG launching on HTC Vive in 2017.
